indications.text:
1.1 Opioid-Induced Constipation in Adult Patients with Chronic Non-Cancer Pain
RELISTOR tablets and RELISTOR injection are indicated for the treatment of opioid-induced
constipation (OIC) in adult patients with chronic non-cancer pain, including patients with
chronic pain related to prior cancer or ...
